title: Steroidal constituents of Ailanthus excelsa Roxb. (Simarubaceae)
author: S. Mandal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemical Research Unit (CCRAS), Survey Unit, Regional Research Institute (Ay.), 4 CN, Sector-V, Bidhannagar, 

 Calcutta-700 091, India 

 IIADR (CCRAS), Tarikhet, Almora-263 663, India 

  Manuscript received 12 June 1998, revised 12 April 1999, accepted 17 June 1999  

  Ailanthus excelsa  Roxb., a rich source of quassinoids and alkaloids, has yielded several steroidal constituents one of which is characterised as stigmasta-4,22-dien-3-one from comprehensive spectral analysis.
